esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// Ranges below replication factor; cluster vulnerable to further failures
| WHERE metrics.ranges_underreplicated IS NOT NULL AND metrics.ranges_underreplicated > 0
| STATS underreplicated = MAX(metrics.ranges_underreplicated)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT underreplicated DESC
